steps.expected: Fields with conf:"custom_name" match config keys to custom_name
steps.observed: PASS - Host with tag conf:"addr" matches key addr, Port with tag conf:"listen_port" matches listen_port

steps.expected: Fields tagged conf:"-" are skipped during unmarshal
steps.observed: PASS - Secret field with conf:"-" remains empty despite config key present

steps.expected: Key matching is case-insensitive
steps.observed: PASS - All 3 sub-tests pass: lowercase, mixed_case, uppercase all match MaxPayload field

steps.expected: Untagged fields match by lowercased Go field name
steps.observed: PASS - MaxPayload matches 'maxpayload', ServerName matches 'servername'

steps.expected: Fields with omitempty tag are still populated when present in config
steps.observed: PASS - Port (conf:"port,omitempty") = 4222, Name (conf:"name,omitempty") = "test" both populated

steps.expected: *string, *int64, *bool allocated when present, nil when absent
steps.observed: PASS - Name=*"nats", Port=*4222, Debug=*true, Missing=nil

steps.expected: *NestedStruct allocated and populated when present, nil when absent
steps.observed: PASS - Cluster=*Inner{Name:"my-cluster", Port:6222}, Missing=nil

steps.observed: PASS - All pointer fields allocated with correct values, Missing=nil

steps.expected: *time.Duration allocated when present, nil when absent
steps.observed: PASS - Ping=*3s, Missing=nil

steps.expected: *time.Time allocated when present, nil when absent
steps.observed: PASS - Created=*2023-11-01T00:00:00Z, Missing=nil

steps.observed: PASS - Error returned mentioning field name "debug"

assertions.title: Missing config fields retain zero values

steps.expected: Pre-set values preserved when config lacks corresponding keys
steps.observed: PASS - Config{Port:9999, Debug:true} preserved after unmarshal of 'name = test' only

steps.expected: Empty config input doesn't error and fields retain Go zero values
steps.observed: PASS - Empty input produces no error, Name="", Port=0

steps.expected: Unexported fields silently skipped, no panic, no modification
steps.observed: PASS - Struct with unexported 'internal' field unmarshals without error; exported Name and Port fields populated correctly

steps.expected: Promoted fields from anonymous struct populated from top-level config keys
steps.observed: PASS - Base{Host, Port} promoted: Host="127.0.0.1", Port=4222, Name="test"

steps.expected: Embedded pointer struct (*Base) auto-allocated and promoted fields populated
steps.observed: PASS - *Base allocated, Host="127.0.0.1", Port=4222, Name="test"

steps.expected: Multiple embedded structs have all promoted fields populated
steps.observed: PASS - Network{Host, Port} and Auth{Username, Password} both promoted correctly alongside Name field

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-UNMARSHAL-011 (struct tag field naming with 4 tests), VAL-UNMARSHAL-012 (omitempty behavior), VAL-UNMARSHAL-013 (pointer fields with 5 tests), VAL-UNMARSHAL-015 (type mismatch errors with 4 sub-tests), VAL-UNMARSHAL-017 (missing keys retain values with 2 tests), VAL-UNMARSHAL-019 (unexported fields skipped), VAL-UNMARSHAL-022 (embedded structs with 3 tests). All tests exercise the specified assertion behaviors and produce --- PASS results.
